description: Create a 4-slide presentation summarizing the rover's upcoming traverse. Slide 1 should have the title 'Jezero Delta Front Traverse' and subtitle 'Science Team Briefing'. Slide 2 should be titled 'Science Objectives' and include the four objectives from ~/Documents/Mars_Briefing/briefing_notes.txt. Slide 3 should be titled 'Traverse Area Map' and include the image ~/Documents/Mars_Briefing/jezero_map.jpg. Slide 4 should be titled 'Primary Science Targets' and contain a table with the Sol, Site_Name, and Elevation for all waypoints in ~/Documents/Mars_Briefing/waypoints_sol_300_320.csv where Science_Priority is 'High'. Save the presentation to ~/Documents/Presentations/traverse_briefing.pptx.
